records.m_Talk_ENG: The only problem is that there is no end to them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only problem is that there is no end to them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only problem is that there is no end to them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After, I shall create a path for your escape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After, I shall create a path for your escape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After, I shall create a path for your escape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a prisoner. How are we supposed to trust you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a prisoner. How are we supposed to trust you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a prisoner. How are we supposed to trust you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: An arrow?! Where did that come from?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An arrow?! Where did that come from?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An arrow?! Where did that come from?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>You are not... allowed to free her.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>You are not... allowed to free her.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>You are not... allowed to free her.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? They're those pumpkin heads we fought in our last expedition!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? They're those pumpkin heads we fought in our last expedition!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? They're those pumpkin heads we fought in our last expedition!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are the devil's soul-voided minions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are the devil's soul-voided minions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are the devil's soul-voided minions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are also victims who have bound themselves to the contract with the sole purpose of living.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are also victims who have bound themselves to the contract with the sole purpose of living.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are also victims who have bound themselves to the contract with the sole purpose of living.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Getting out of here is what matters the most!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Getting out of here is what matters the most!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Getting out of here is what matters the most!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh? What was that eerie cry...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh? What was that eerie cry...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh? What was that eerie cry...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She killed the monsters... with a single strike?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She killed the monsters... with a single strike?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She killed the monsters... with a single strike?
